name: Chat Composer
purpose: Prompt entry surface for AI interactions, follow-up questions, and multimodal task composition.

structures.name: Prompt Composer
structures.notes: A clean prompt entry area that supports quick task execution.

structures.name: Expanded Composer
structures.notes: Used when files, tools, or structured context are attached.

structures.name: Minimal Follow-up Composer
structures.notes: A lighter variant that works inside conversation views.

contentExamples: 发消息或按住空格说话...
interactionNotes: The composer should feel precise and calm; the primary button is the strongest accent.
Use border and subtle surface shifts to indicate active state, reserving vivid color for submission.
